sourceVersion: Pasco County Schools 2026-2027 Student and Teacher Calendar PDF
seoTitle: Pasco County Schools Calendar 2026-2027 (PDF, Holidays & Breaks)
seoDescription: View Pasco County Schools Calendar 2026-2027 from official district sources with first day, holidays, breaks, early release days, PDF download and calendar file.
calendarNotes: Pasco County Schools starts the 2026-2027 school year on August 13, 2026 and lists May 28, 2027 as the students' last day. Thanksgiving Break runs November 23-27, Winter Break runs December 21-January 1, and Spring Break runs March 22-26. The calendar lists early release days on October 28, January 27, and February 24, marks February 12 and April 16 as student days that can convert to no-school days if make-up time is not needed, and reserves June 1-4 as extended closure student make-up days. Those June dates are reserved make-up windows and are only used if required after extended closures.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Pasco County start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Pasco County Schools starts the 2026-2027 school year on Thursday, August 13, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Pasco County Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 22 through Friday, March 26, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Pasco County in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The students' last day is Friday, May 28, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Pasco County school end in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Pasco County Schools ends the 2026-2027 student calendar on Friday, May 28, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: Which Pasco 2026-2027 dates may convert if make-up time is not needed?
calendarFaqs.a: The official calendar marks February 12 and April 16, 2027 as student days that will convert to no-school days if not needed as make-up time after first semester.

calendarFaqs.q: How many days are in the Pasco County school year 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Pasco County Schools lists 180 instructional days for the 2026-2027 school year.

calendarFaqs.q: Is Pasco County Schools closed on Labor Day 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. Pasco County Schools lists Labor Day on Monday, September 7, 2026 as a holiday on the 2026-2027 calendar.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Pasco County Thanksgiving Break 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Thanksgiving Break for Pasco County Schools runs Monday, November 23 through Friday, November 27, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: Can I add the Pasco County school calendar to Google Calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. MySchoolDates provides a one-time .ics calendar file generated from the reviewed Pasco County Schools calendar records. It can be imported into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook, but it will not automatically update if PCS revises the official calendar.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Pasco County Schools have school tomorrow?
calendarFaqs.a: Use the date table on this page for scheduled student holidays, breaks, early release days, and make-up windows. For tomorrow-specific closures, delays, or emergency changes, check the official Pasco County Schools calendar page and district announcements.

yearNumbers.label: Early Release Days
yearNumbers.detail: Early release days are listed on October 28, January 27, and February 24.

yearNumbers.label: Extended Closure Make-Up Days
yearNumbers.detail: The calendar reserves June 1-4 as extended closure student make-up days.

yearNumbers.label: Quarter Days
yearNumbers.detail: The official calendar lists quarter lengths of 41, 44, 52, and 44 days.

whatsNew.title: Changes from the 2025-2026 Calendar
content: The first student day moves from August 11 in 2025 to August 13 in 2026.
Spring Break moves from March 30-April 3 in 2026 to March 22-26 in 2027.
The calendar adds June 1-4, 2027 as reserved extended closure student make-up days.
